🧠 Modest ratings for this level; modest recent form; going may not suit; good course record, in-form trainer (Ismail Mohammed).
7 Let Her Go (IRE) 5 No Nay Never / Montjeu ▼ 0.5 9-9 Callum Rodriguez Ollie Sangster 63 27 44-76 39.5 7.3% 13.8 13.8 - -
📰 Some promise in novice/maiden events but she started her handicap career with a laboured effort over 1m at Chelmsford (sixth of seven; 16-1) in February; this new trip could help on pedigree but she needs to leave that latest form well behind.
🧠 Modest ratings for this level; modest recent form, on a declining curve; breeding is a slight negative for these conditions (No Nay Never), going may not suit; top jockey booked.
8 Adba (FR) 3 Starspangledbanner / Frankel ▼ 0.6 9-9 Hector Crouch Ralph Beckett 64 46 78-7 36.3 4.6% 21.8 22.2 - -
📰 Well held in three AW runs (1m) since November but this unexposed filly has a good pedigree and she's a possible improver upped in trip on handicap debut; needs close look with headgear added.
🧠 Modest ratings for this level; modest recent form; breeding is a slight negative for these conditions (Starspangledbanner), going may not suit; top jockey booked.
9 Just Call Me Mo (GB) 6 Mohaather / Hallowed Crown 8-11 (-12) Jack Mitchell Joseph Parr 63 44 898-7 34.8 3.7% 27.2 23.4 - -
📰 Struggled in his three 2yo runs and was always behind on handicap debut over C&D (weak 7-1 shot) last month; may have needed that run but he needs to show a lot more this time.
🧠 Modest ratings for this level; modest recent form; going may not suit, well-handicapped at the weights; good course record.

  {
    "course": "Thirsk",
    "time": "14:43",
    "race_name": "racingtv.com Restricted Novice Stakes (For Horses In Bands C And D) (GBB Race) (Div I)",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m",
    "going": "Good",
    "class": "Class 4",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 4,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Clonquest (GB)",
        "jockey": "Paul Mulrennan",
        "trainer": "David & Nicola Barron",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "73",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "5-2",
        "sire": "Ulysses",
        "dam_sire": "Vale Of York",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "47.8",
        "model_pct": "18.1%",
        "fair_odds": "5.53",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Came from well off the pace to finish second at Newcastle (7f) in January and the winner went in again next time; that run sets the standard here and this colt's debut was also encouraging."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Arc At Her",
        "jockey": "Luke Morris",
        "trainer": "Dylan Cunha",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "-",
        "sire": "Study Of Man",
        "dam_sire": "Hernando",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "8-10",
        "score": "46.1",
        "model_pct": "15.3%",
        "fair_odds": "6.54",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "+4.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "20,000gns yearling; sixth foal; half-sister to winners All Go (6f-1m) and Dea Giulia (Italian 9.5f); dam 2m winner (RPR 64) and very well related; the only runner who lacks experience but makes sense to check the betting."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Sayidah Aleen",
        "jockey": "NON-RUNNER",
        "trainer": "Jack Channon",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "4",
        "sire": "Ten Sovereigns",
        "dam_sire": "Refuse To Bend",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "8-10",
        "score": "45.6",
        "model_pct": "14.6%",
        "fair_odds": "6.85",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "42,000euros yearling; made a quiet start when last to finish at Wolverhampton where she was a weak 12-1 chance."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Simba's Pride (GB)",
        "jockey": "Mark Winn",
        "trainer": "Michael Dods",
        "ts": "60",
        "rpr": "59",
        "or": "-",

        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "8-13",

        "model_pct": "13.2%",
        "fair_odds": "7.60",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "2,000gns yearling; beaten under 5l over 5f at Thirsk but that was nearly a year ago and he's up markedly in trip this time; pedigree is quite speedy."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Simon Pierre",

        "trainer": "Gemma Tutty",
        "ts": "29",
        "rpr": "68",
        "or": "-",

        "dam_sire": "Monsun",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-1",

        "fair_odds": "8.05",
        "best_dec": "3.00",
        "edge": "-21.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Cost 72,000euros as a 2yo and the maiden he contested at the Lincoln meeting (7f, good to soft) was dominated by well-bred horses from good yards; although tenth of 12, he was beaten only 7.5l."
      },

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Just two wins from his 30 starts but placed over 1m/7f on Newcastle's Tapeta on his last four outings, the latest on reappearance a fortnight ago; successful over 7f here last summer and should go well if stall 12 isn't too big an inconvenience."

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Started his handicap career with wins at Doncaster (1m, good to firm) and Musselburgh (1m1f, good) last August; had excuses for his two subsequent defeats (too keen upped to 1m4f final start) and retains unexposed potential; claims if fully primed after six months off."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Jamaican Storm",
        "jockey": "Paul Mulrennan",
        "trainer": "Bryan Smart",
        "ts": "72",
        "rpr": "80",
        "or": "65",
        "form": "308321",
        "sire": "Havana Grey",
        "dam_sire": "Montjeu",
        "stall": 13,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "52.4",
        "model_pct": "11.7%",
        "fair_odds": "8.52",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "+0.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Placed twice in March prior to making it 17th time lucky at Newcastle (1m) a fortnight ago; arrives fit and in form but eighth is the best he's managed in four previous turf outings."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Perfidia (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Duran Fentiman",
        "trainer": "Tim Easterby",
        "ts": "76",
        "rpr": "83",
        "or": "56",
        "form": "23697-",
        "sire": "Dandy Man",
        "dam_sire": "Acclamation",
        "stall": 10,
        "weight": "8-9",
        "score": "49.8",
        "model_pct": "9.0%",
        "fair_odds": "11.14",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": ""
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Eve's Boy (GB)",
        "jockey": "Sean Kirrane",
        "trainer": "Michael Dods",
        "ts": "66",
        "rpr": "88",
        "or": "68",
        "form": "35-777",
        "sire": "Expert Eye",
        "dam_sire": "Shamardal",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "49.6",
        "model_pct": "8.8%",
        "fair_odds": "11.43",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Yet to add to his 2yo novice win but is down to a mark in the 60s for the first time now back on the grass after a two-month break; a return to form wouldn't surprise."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Harswell Ruby",
        "jockey": "Joanna Mason",
        "trainer": "Roger Fell",
        "ts": "79",
        "rpr": "85",
        "or": "69",
        "form": "2240-7",
        "sire": "Far Above",
        "dam_sire": "Spinning World",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "49.5",
        "model_pct": "8.7%",
        "fair_odds": "11.54",
        "best_dec": "4.00",
        "edge": "-17.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Had several close calls on turf in the second half of last year; not disgraced back from four months off at Newcastle three weeks ago; 1-22 overall but she could be very competitive with that run behind her."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Volto Di Medusa",
        "jockey": "Callum Shepherd",
        "trainer": "Jack Jones",
        "ts": "37",
        "rpr": "84",
        "or": "67",
        "form": "666-35",
        "sire": "Ten Sovereigns",
        "dam_sire": "Pivotal",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "48.5",
        "model_pct": "7.8%",
        "fair_odds": "12.76",
        "best_dec": "6.50",
        "edge": "-8.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Dual 1m winner (good turf/AW); ran well for third at Wolverhampton last month and shaped quite nicely again (caught too far back) when fifth over 1m2f at Lingfield (AW) a fortnight ago; one of the more likely types."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Pol Roger (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Connor Beasley",
        "trainer": "Michael Dods",
        "ts": "79",
        "rpr": "83",
        "or": "70",
        "form": "24908-",
        "sire": "Churchill",
        "dam_sire": "Mastercraftsman",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "46.4",
        "model_pct": "6.2%",
        "fair_odds": "16.07",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Lost his way in the autumn; has dropped to a favourable mark as a result (went close off 5lb higher last autumn) but a losing run of 21 doesn't inspire confidence; first start for 140 days."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Mariner",
        "jockey": "Darragh Keenan",
        "trainer": "Jennie Candlish",
        "ts": "76",
        "rpr": "81",
        "or": "66",
        "form": "1469-8",
        "sire": "Kingman",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "43.7",
        "model_pct": "4.7%",
        "fair_odds": "21.28",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "-1.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Winner over 1m at Doncaster (good to firm) and 1m2f at Ripon (good) last spring; minor late headway on his recent AW reappearance and he's dipped to 1lb below the mark he defied at Ripon."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,
        "horse": "Whiskey Pete (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Alex Jary(3)",
        "trainer": "Nigel Tinkler",
        "ts": "58",
        "rpr": "78",
        "or": "66",
        "form": "27356-",
        "sire": "Night Of Thunder",
        "dam_sire": "Norse Dancer",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "42.9",
        "model_pct": "4.3%",
        "fair_odds": "23.22",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Useful for Ralph Beckett but nowhere near that level for this yard last year, albeit placed twice over 1m2f at Doncaster off his reduced mark at the end of last summer; off six months; the betting should help guide to expectations."
      },
      {
        "rank": 11,
        "horse": "Copper And Five (GB)",
        "jockey": "James Sullivan",
        "trainer": "Ruth Carr",
        "ts": "74",
        "rpr": "83",
        "or": "52",
        "form": "84464-",
        "sire": "Paco Boy",
        "dam_sire": "Observatory",
        "stall": 11,
        "weight": "8-5",
        "score": "42.0",
        "model_pct": "3.9%",
        "fair_odds": "25.65",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": ""
      },
      {
        "rank": 12,
        "horse": "Finally Escaped",
        "jockey": "Mark Winn",
        "trainer": "Roger Fell",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "78",
        "or": "57",
        "form": "2656",
        "sire": "Mohaather",
        "dam_sire": "Clodovil",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "8-10",
        "score": "40.7",
        "model_pct": "3.4%",
        "fair_odds": "29.19",
        "best_dec": "51.00",
        "edge": "+2.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Unexposed after four AW starts in recent months but never involved when sixth of eight on 1m Southwell handicap debut 13 days ago; has raced keenly and a first-time hood and tongue-tie are reached for now switching to turf; improvement will be needed."
      },
      {
        "rank": 13,
        "horse": "Jewel Maker",
        "jockey": "Warren Fentiman(3)",
        "trainer": "Tim Easterby",
        "ts": "75",
        "rpr": "81",
        "or": "64",
        "form": "5486-9",
        "sire": "Invincible Spirit",
        "dam_sire": "Medicean",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "38.9",
        "model_pct": "2.8%",
        "fair_odds": "35.55",
        "best_dec": "29.00",
        "edge": "+0.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Veteran with 12 wins to his name but didn't suggest his next one is near when trailing throughout on his AW reappearance three weeks ago."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Thirsk",
    "time": "16:25",
    "race_name": "British EBF Michael Foster Conditions Stakes",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "7f",
    "going": "Good",
    "class": "Class 3",
    "draw_bias": "low",
    "draw_strength": 4,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Mount Athos",
        "jockey": "James Doyle",
        "trainer": "James Tate",
        "ts": "95",
        "rpr": "121",
        "or": "108",
        "form": "023-71",
        "sire": "Dark Angel",
        "dam_sire": "Iffraaj",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "67.8",
        "model_pct": "28.4%",
        "fair_odds": "3.52",
        "best_dec": "6.50",
        "edge": "+6.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Running in this for the third time, finishing second in 2023 and 2025; on both occasions he arrived on the back of a 7f win at Kempton and he landed that same race yet again 23 days ago; should give it another good shot."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Poet Master (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Sam James",
        "trainer": "K R Burke",
        "ts": "92",
        "rpr": "125",
        "or": "113",
        "form": "5/922-",
        "sire": "Lope De Vega",
        "dam_sire": "Kodiac",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "61.3",
        "model_pct": "15.4%",
        "fair_odds": "6.48",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Raced almost exclusively at 7f; Group 2 winner in Ireland as a 4yo; ran close to that level when second in Longchamp Group 3 (very soft) and the Group 2 Challenge at Newmarket (good; Scoville 5.5l back in fourth) last autumn; disappointing on his 2025 reappearance but won first time up in 2023 and 2024; leading form claims."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Elarak (GB)",
        "jockey": "Jason Watson",
        "trainer": "Charles Hills",
        "ts": "89",
        "rpr": "113",
        "or": "103",
        "form": "11761-",
        "sire": "Kingman",
        "dam_sire": "Teofilo",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "59.1",
        "model_pct": "12.5%",
        "fair_odds": "7.99",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Back on the up with a bang returned to 7f and ridden positively when ready winner of a handicap at Newmarket (good to firm) last September; subsequently gelded; has the potential for even better this year and his stable is no stranger to success in this, including in the Shadwell silks."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Scoville (GB)",
        "jockey": "Cieren Fallon",
        "trainer": "William Haggas",
        "ts": "111",
        "rpr": "118",
        "or": "102",
        "form": "1104-",
        "sire": "Too Darn Hot",
        "dam_sire": "Manduro",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "58.9",
        "model_pct": "12.3%",
        "fair_odds": "8.10",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won 1m novices on good to firm on his first two outings, on the second occasion making all by a whopping 14l at Newmarket; didn't confirm that abundant promise in two subsequent Group races (including 5.5l behind Poet Master at Newmarket) but still very early days and could easily resume his progression on this reappearance having been gelded."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Myal",
        "jockey": "David Allan",
        "trainer": "Steph Hollinshead",
        "ts": "93",
        "rpr": "115",
        "or": "103",
        "form": "4002-5",
        "sire": "Al Kazeem",
        "dam_sire": "Dubai Destination",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "57.8",
        "model_pct": "11.2%",
        "fair_odds": "8.96",
        "best_dec": "7.50",
        "edge": "-1.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Most progressive in the last couple of years, winning six 7f handicaps, with the first gained off of a rating of 67; another career-best effort when second in 7f Redcar Listed race (good to soft) on his final 4yo start; should be spot on for this after finishing fifth of 12 in a 6f Doncaster Listed event on his reappearance 13 days ago."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Seacruiser",
        "jockey": "Rossa Ryan",
        "trainer": "Ralph Beckett",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "51/",
        "sire": "Sea The Stars",
        "dam_sire": "Iffraaj",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "56.8",
        "model_pct": "10.2%",
        "fair_odds": "9.85",
        "best_dec": "7.00",
        "edge": "-2.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Looked a good prospect when making all in a 1m Newmarket maiden (good to soft) in September 2024 but hasn't been seen since; could be the sort to make up for lost time this year but this is a big ask on only his third start after such a long absence; has been gelded."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Darkness (FR)",
        "jockey": "Daniel Tudhope",
        "trainer": "David O'Meara",
        "ts": "91",
        "rpr": "105",
        "or": "94",
        "form": "09410-",
        "sire": "Siyouni",
        "dam_sire": "Makfi",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "51.2",
        "model_pct": "6.0%",
        "fair_odds": "16.68",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Useful sort who landed fast-ground handicap wins over C&D and at Goodwood last year; however, he has plenty to find on these terms and failed to beat a rival on his reappearance in 2024 and 2025."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Rhoscolyn (GB)",
        "jockey": "Mark Winn",
        "trainer": "David O'Meara",
        "ts": "102",
        "rpr": "108",
        "or": "94",
        "form": "00604-",
        "sire": "Territories",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "47.0",
        "model_pct": "4.0%",
        "fair_odds": "24.77",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Last year's Golden Mile win at Goodwood (strong record there) shows he's still smart on his day; third in this in 2022 but hasn't beaten a rival in the last two runnings (all reappearance); safe to look elsewhere."
      }
    ]
  },

  {
    "course": "Wolverhampton (AW)",
    "time": "16:50",
    "race_name": "Free Bets On attheraces.com Conditions Stakes (GBB Race)",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "AW",
    "dist": "6f",
    "going": "Standard",
    "class": "Class 2",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 3,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Ten Carat Harry",
        "jockey": "Saffie Osborne",
        "trainer": "Jamie Osborne",
        "ts": "98",
        "rpr": "106",
        "or": "97",
        "form": "11-133",
        "sire": "Ardad",
        "dam_sire": "Broken Vow",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "66.1",
        "model_pct": "27.6%",
        "fair_odds": "3.62",
        "best_dec": "3.50",
        "edge": "-6.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Five-race winning spree came to an end when third in Lingfield Listed race (7f, Polytrack) in February and again filled that position in valuable event at Newcastle (6f, Tapeta) one week ago; that run can be upgraded (had no cover from a fairly strong wind) and he must be considered with fitness assured."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Lady Kodiac (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Clifford Lee",
        "trainer": "James Tate",
        "ts": "74",
        "rpr": "98",
        "or": "90",
        "form": "311-",
        "sire": "Kodiac",
        "dam_sire": "Zamindar",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "64.6",
        "model_pct": "22.0%",
        "fair_odds": "4.55",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Made a promising debut on turf (5f) in August and made virtually all when winning her next two starts, both at Chelmsford (Polytrack) over 6f, latterly in October; the least exposed of these and likely we haven't seen the best of her; interesting ahead of this comeback."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Sirius A (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Jack Mitchell",
        "trainer": "James Horton",
        "ts": "88",
        "rpr": "106",
        "or": "98",
        "form": "12432-",
        "sire": "Palace Pier",
        "dam_sire": "Sea The Stars",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "61.6",
        "model_pct": "13.7%",
        "fair_odds": "7.30",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Matched his previous best when neck second (demoted to third) in Group 3 Sirenia at Kempton (6f; Sayidah Hard Spun fifth) in September and took it up a notch when runner-up in warm Listed event at Dundalk (5f, also Polytrack) the following month; ability to act on AW a plus and he's much respected on this return."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Comical Point (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Oisin Murphy",
        "trainer": "Andrew Balding",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "102",
        "or": "94",
        "form": "15643-",
        "sire": "Blue Point",
        "dam_sire": "Dandy Man",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "59.1",
        "model_pct": "9.3%",
        "fair_odds": "10.77",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Highly tried as a juvenile and his best run came on second start when fifth of 15 in Royal Ascot's Norfolk (5f, good to firm) in June; back near that level when third in York Listed event (6f, good) when last seen in October and commands respect on this return and AW debut; tongue-tie added."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Tadej (GB)",
        "jockey": "Hollie Doyle",
        "trainer": "Archie Watson",
        "ts": "72",
        "rpr": "111",
        "or": "103",
        "form": "3106-3",
        "sire": "Ardad",
        "dam_sire": "Frankel",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "58.1",
        "model_pct": "8.0%",
        "fair_odds": "12.53",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Went close in French Group 2 in July and picked up Deauville Group 3 (also 6f, first-time blinkers) the following month; gelded prior to his reappearance and did enough to show he'd trained on when third of four, beaten 3l, on AW debut at Kempton (1m) in February; wore cheekpieces that day and now drops back to sprinting in returning blinkers; firmly in the picture."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Anthelia (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Lewis Edmunds",
        "trainer": "Rod Millman",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "112",
        "or": "99",
        "form": "51517-",
        "sire": "Supremacy",
        "dam_sire": "Red Clubs",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "57.6",
        "model_pct": "7.3%",
        "fair_odds": "13.60",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Splendidly tough juvenile filly who got up late to bag the valuable Super Sprint (5f, good) in July and took her form to a new level when gamely landing the Group 3 Dick Poole at Salisbury (6f, soft) in September; couldn't make a dent in Group 1 Cheveley Park on her final start of the term but that's easily excused and she's a fascinating candidate on this reappearance/AW debut."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Chairmanfourtimes (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Oisin McSweeney",
        "trainer": "Adrian Paul Keatley",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "103",
        "or": "94",
        "form": "13210-",
        "sire": "Nando Parrado",
        "dam_sire": "Dragon Pulse",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "57.0",
        "model_pct": "6.8%",
        "fair_odds": "14.78",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Consistent at two and his form spiked when winning soft-ground Listed event at Ayr (5f) in September; previously showed he stays 6f and not dismissed on this reappearance/AW debut, albeit easy turf might be more his thing."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Sayidah Hard Spun (GB)",
        "jockey": "Finley Marsh",
        "trainer": "Richard Hughes",
        "ts": "86",
        "rpr": "99",
        "or": "90",
        "form": "16135-",
        "sire": "Ubettabelieveit",
        "dam_sire": "Hard Spun",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "55.5",
        "model_pct": "5.3%",
        "fair_odds": "18.76",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Landed a Kempton novice (6f, Polytrack) on her second start and it was a creditable effort when fifth in Group 3 over that C&D (Sirius A placed third) when last seen in September; that form leaves her with a bit to find but ability to act on AW is a positive and she can't be ruled out confidently."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Thirsk",
    "time": "17:00",
    "race_name": "Download The Raceday Ready App Handicap (GBBPlus Race)",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m4f",
    "going": "Good",
    "class": "Class 3",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 4,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Pride Of Donegal",
        "jockey": "Callum Shepherd",
        "trainer": "Charlie Johnston",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "103",
        "or": "89",
        "form": "-44311",
        "sire": "Saxon Warrior",
        "dam_sire": "Peintre Celebre",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-10",
        "score": "59.6",
        "model_pct": "40.6%",
        "fair_odds": "2.47",
        "best_dec": "3.25",
        "edge": "-8.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Consistent 4yo who has really raised his game since the blinkers went on, twice making all over 1m4f at Wolverhampton; it was never in doubt there last weekend and he's 3lb well in under a penalty; unraced on turf."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Asmen Warrior (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Luke Morris",
        "trainer": "James Owen",
        "ts": "87",
        "rpr": "101",
        "or": "88",
        "form": "12262-",
        "sire": "Saxon Warrior",
        "dam_sire": "Docksider",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "56.3",
        "model_pct": "27.3%",
        "fair_odds": "3.66",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Sixth career run when the odds-on winner for a 1m2f maiden for previous yard; bar one blip, he's been thereabouts in his handicaps for James Owen and this slightly longer trip is worth a go."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Gibside (GB)",
        "jockey": "David Allan",
        "trainer": "Tim Easterby",
        "ts": "79",
        "rpr": "99",
        "or": "81",
        "form": "87615-",
        "sire": "Time Test",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "49.1",
        "model_pct": "11.6%",
        "fair_odds": "8.60",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "The ground was soft when winning over this far at Catterick in October and he's usually seen over further these days; under these conditions he may be found wanting for some pace."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "In The Breeze (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Cieren Fallon",
        "trainer": "Henrietta C Knight",
        "ts": "62",
        "rpr": "100",
        "or": "81",
        "form": "01447-",
        "sire": "Harzand",
        "dam_sire": "Whipper",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "49.1",
        "model_pct": "11.6%",
        "fair_odds": "8.66",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won at Pontefract (1m4f, good to soft) in September off just 3lb lower and final three defeats for Mick Appleby were over further; could go well if ready for action after his break."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Roarin' Success",
        "jockey": "Paul Mulrennan",
        "trainer": "Donald McCain",
        "ts": "67",
        "rpr": "100",
        "or": "83",
        "form": "41200-",
        "sire": "Roaring Lion",
        "dam_sire": "Shamardal",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "47.0",
        "model_pct": "9.0%",
        "fair_odds": "11.15",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "+2.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Competitively treated on her form for Harry Charlton and she's not performed badly over hurdles for current yard; had a wind operation; hard to dismiss."
      }
    ]
  },

        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "2-25 for Richard Fahey, the wins coming in 2024 (one over C&D); left that yard out of form and for 10,000gns; historically well handicapped if Adam Kirby can get him going again; tries cheekpieces; market interesting."
      },
      {
        "rank": 15,
        "horse": "Sunny Orange (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Duran Fentiman",
        "trainer": "Tim Easterby",
        "ts": "63",
        "rpr": "71",
        "or": "59",
        "form": "53839-",
        "sire": "Expert Eye",
        "dam_sire": "Lawman",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "41.8",
        "model_pct": "4.0%",
        "fair_odds": "25.06",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Hard to win with (4-43) and, although he has form elsewhere, he does like Beverley; took a while to find his form last season."
      },
      {
        "rank": 16,
        "horse": "Jkr Cobbler",
        "jockey": "Andrew Mullen",
        "trainer": "Iain Jardine",
        "ts": "66",

        "fair_odds": "27.72",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "-4.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Running fairly well this year and the handicapper's helped his cause; can sometimes miss the break but if giving himself a chance he might not be far away."
      }
    ]
  },

  {
    "course": "Dundalk (AW)",
    "time": "17:42",
    "race_name": "DundalkStadium.com Handicap",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "AW",
    "dist": "6f",
    "going": "Standard",
    "class": "",
    "draw_bias": "low",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "An Laochmor",
        "jockey": "Colin Keane",
        "trainer": "Daniel James Murphy",
        "ts": "45",
        "rpr": "59",
        "or": "56",
        "form": "9-4211",
        "sire": "Bungle Inthejungle",
        "dam_sire": "Shamardal",
        "stall": 11,
        "weight": "10-0",
        "score": "58.5",
        "model_pct": "27.0%",
        "fair_odds": "3.71",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Now 13lb higher than when fourth behind Winemaker here in January on stable debut; belatedly off the mark (17th outing) when landing the odds in a low-grade 5f Lingfield handicap in February; backed that up when favourite for a 5f contest nine days ago."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Winemaker",
        "jockey": "Shane Foley",
        "trainer": "H D McGuigan",
        "ts": "52",
        "rpr": "63",
        "or": "57",
        "form": "5-1483",
        "sire": "Johnny Barnes",
        "dam_sire": "Motivator",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "10-1",
        "score": "50.9",
        "model_pct": "14.5%",
        "fair_odds": "6.89",
        "best_dec": "3.00",
        "edge": "-20.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Recorded a fifth win (third on AW) when scoring over C&D in January off 5lb lower (has won off a mark of 72 before); hampered when attempting to follow up over 7f next time, finishing 2 1/2l fourth; not at his best back on turf at the Curragh before another solid 7f run here two weeks ago."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Sovereign Banter",
        "jockey": "Jimmy Dalton(7)",
        "trainer": "Andrew Slattery",
        "ts": "54",
        "rpr": "62",
        "or": "54",
        "form": "22-384",
        "sire": "Ten Sovereigns",
        "dam_sire": "Invincible Spirit",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-12",
        "score": "47.6",
        "model_pct": "11.2%",
        "fair_odds": "8.97",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "-8.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "C&D winner last October, beating good yardstick Nikki Swango; has made the frame in four of his six subsequent races here, including two seconds; best of three 2026 runs when third behind Winemaker in January; stable's horses showing good form across a range of categories."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Oxford Circus",
        "jockey": "J M Sheridan",
        "trainer": "Denis Gerard Hogan",
        "ts": "34",
        "rpr": "64",
        "or": "58",
        "form": "371D0",
        "sire": "Mehmas",
        "dam_sire": "Kodiac",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "10-2",
        "score": "47.6",
        "model_pct": "11.1%",
        "fair_odds": "9.00",
        "best_dec": "6.00",
        "edge": "-4.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Expensive yearling; unraced for the Crisfords, bought cheaply last October; narrow winner of a C&D maiden in February on third start; subsequently stripped of that victory due to her rider being deemed ineligible on a technicality; dropped away to finish in rear on handicap debut over C&D three weeks ago."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Jered Maddox",
        "jockey": "Luke McAteer",
        "trainer": "David Marnane",
        "ts": "38",
        "rpr": "62",
        "or": "57",
        "form": "-80803",
        "sire": "Lawman",
        "dam_sire": "Oasis Dream",
        "stall": 10,
        "weight": "10-1",
        "score": "43.8",
        "model_pct": "8.2%",
        "fair_odds": "12.19",
        "best_dec": "6.50",
        "edge": "-8.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "12-86, including nine course wins (four over C&D); mark has dropped significantly since his last win in 2025; generally poor form, until an encouraging display in taking third over 5f here three weeks ago; rider reported he received a check in the final furlong."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Hot To Foxtrot",
        "jockey": "Ronan Whelan",
        "trainer": "John James Feane",
        "ts": "48",
        "rpr": "59",
        "or": "57",
        "form": "3900-5",
        "sire": "Footstepsinthesand",
        "dam_sire": "Iffraaj",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "10-1",
        "score": "40.0",
        "model_pct": "6.0%",
        "fair_odds": "16.69",
        "best_dec": "6.50",
        "edge": "-8.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Very little mileage on the clock; definite promise in two of her maiden runs, the first of which was in 2023; three handicap attempts in 2025 were poor; much improved when fifth over 7f here a fortnight ago, but has a bit to find with third-placed Winemaker."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Rough Diamond (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Rory Cleary",
        "trainer": "John G Carr",
        "ts": "47",
        "rpr": "61",
        "or": "51",
        "form": "78-000",
        "sire": "Starspangledbanner",
        "dam_sire": "Kyllachy",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "38.6",
        "model_pct": "5.4%",
        "fair_odds": "18.59",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "C&D winner, five-time scorer in all; has struggled in three 7f runs since joining John Carr after a spell in Britain."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Son Of Wind",
        "jockey": "Brandon Wilkie(5)",
        "trainer": "Matthew J Smith",
        "ts": "50",
        "rpr": "62",
        "or": "57",
        "form": "5885-0",
        "sire": "Kessaar",
        "dam_sire": "Zebedee",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "10-1",
        "score": "38.2",
        "model_pct": "5.2%",
        "fair_odds": "19.30",
        "best_dec": "34.00",
        "edge": "+4.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "1-15; well enough handicapped on juvenile form when he achieved a peak rating of 70 based on consistent form at Chelmsford; regressive last season; no sign of a revival in form when last of 14 on Irish debut over 7f here two weeks ago."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Rattletheonionbag",
        "jockey": "Chris Hayes",
        "trainer": "W P Browne",
        "ts": "41",
        "rpr": "63",
        "or": "40",
        "form": "09-390",
        "sire": "Elzaam",
        "dam_sire": "Kodiac",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "8-12",
        "score": "36.5",
        "model_pct": "4.5%",
        "fair_odds": "22.07",
        "best_dec": "21.00",
        "edge": "-0.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "A 30-race maiden; placed in six of her 17 races at this venue; generally uninspiring form lately, although could be given some sort of chance on her third placing over C&D three starts ago."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,
        "horse": "Snowballs",
        "jockey": "W J Lee",
        "trainer": "W McCreery",
        "ts": "38",
        "rpr": "61",
        "or": "55",
        "form": "5497-7",
        "sire": "Bungle Inthejungle",
        "dam_sire": "Big Bad Bob",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-13",
        "score": "36.1",
        "model_pct": "4.4%",
        "fair_odds": "22.74",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-3.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Glimmers of promise in maidens but has struggled in three handicaps over 5f; made some late headway after starting slowly when beaten 7l in seventh behind An Laochmor here nine days ago."
      },
      {
        "rank": 11,
        "horse": "Cooee Call",
        "jockey": "Sadhbh Tormey(7)",
        "trainer": "T G McCourt",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "60",
        "or": "41",
        "form": "6000-6",
        "sire": "Soldier's Call",
        "dam_sire": "Sea The Stars",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "8-13",
        "score": "29.6",
        "model_pct": "2.6%",
        "fair_odds": "38.79",
        "best_dec": "51.00",
        "edge": "+1.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Weak form for his previous trainer; marginally better when sixth of ten behind today's rival An Laochmor on stable debut here last week."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Wolverhampton (AW)",
    "time": "17:58",
    "race_name": "Download The Racecourse App Raceday Ready Fillies' Novice Stakes (GBB Race)",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "AW",
    "dist": "1m",
    "going": "Standard",
    "class": "Class 4",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 3,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Estissa",
        "jockey": "Oisin Murphy",
        "trainer": "James Fanshawe",
        "ts": "35",
        "rpr": "81",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "3-1",
        "sire": "Dubawi",
        "dam_sire": "Wootton Bassett",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "71.1",
        "model_pct": "36.2%",
        "fair_odds": "2.76",
        "best_dec": "1.18",
        "edge": "-62.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Dam was a Group/Grade 1 winner for these connections and this one built on promising debut in December when landing C&D novice under Oisin Murphy 18 days ago; fine prospect who looks sure to go on to better things."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Caim (GB)",
        "jockey": "-",
        "trainer": "Edward Bethell",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "87",
        "or": "91",
        "form": "12-",
        "sire": "Oasis Dream",
        "dam_sire": "Iffraaj",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "60.4",
        "model_pct": "24.9%",
        "fair_odds": "4.02",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "10-1 when winning Beverley novice (7.4f) impressively in September and handled a rise in grade well when close second in Newbury Listed event (7f, also soft) the following month; latter form has yet to be thoroughly tested but this is a good spot to get her season underway and it's a high bar she sets on this AW debut."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Royal Poetry",
        "jockey": "Sean Levey",
        "trainer": "Richard Hannon",
        "ts": "57",
        "rpr": "72",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "3-4",
        "sire": "Lope De Vega",
        "dam_sire": "Frankel",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "8-13",
        "score": "47.7",
        "model_pct": "15.9%",
        "fair_odds": "6.28",
        "best_dec": "7.50",
        "edge": "+3.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "From the family of Dubawi; promising third of 13 in 1m Southwell novice on debut in November and she plugged away when dropped sharply in trip for her reappearance here (6f) 11 days ago; step back up in distance an obvious plus and it's highly likely her best days are ahead of her."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Calypso Bloom",
        "jockey": "Robert Havlin",
        "trainer": "Thomas Faulkner",
        "ts": "12",
        "rpr": "47",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "8-8",
        "sire": "Ulysses",
        "dam_sire": "Kingsalsa",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "10-2",
        "score": "38.5",
        "model_pct": "11.6%",
        "fair_odds": "8.66",
        "best_dec": "41.00",
        "edge": "+9.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Big prices and well held on both starts so far, latterly at Kempton (1m3f; 250-1) 11 days ago."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Veld (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Rob Hornby",
        "trainer": "Hughie Morrison",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "44",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "7",
        "sire": "Bobby's Kitten",
        "dam_sire": "Footstepsinthesand",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "8-13",
        "score": "38.2",
        "model_pct": "11.4%",
        "fair_odds": "8.76",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Half-sister to winners Danger Bay (1m1f; RPR 100) and Myna (1m2f AW; 68); dam 1m4f AW winner (86); displayed abundant inexperience when last on her debut at Southwell (1m; 66-1) one month ago; probably needs more time."
      }
    ]
  },

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Best known as a Ripon specialist with ten wins there, including his last two starts of 2025; has won fresh, but has tended to need his reappearance in recent years."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,

        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Has been a revelation on the AW since December (322113413111111); possible that his progression has been general, but it will have to be if he is to win this as he is 25lb higher than when last on turf (0-9)."

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Winner of eight races; fit from the AW when second of ten at Doncaster (5f, good to soft) 12 days ago; 1lb well in and return to 6f and drying ground wouldn't be a problem; high on list."
      },

        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won three times last spring and is back off the same mark as for the latest, but he lost his form completely later in the season; proven fresh, though, and not the biggest surprise if he were to figure."
      },

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Out of the frame in all six starts since returning in October, but has dropped to a dangerous mark as a result and he won't have a problem with the likely conditions; off ten weeks, but has a good record fresh; could go well at a price."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,

        "edge": "-",

        "spotlight": "Scored twice on a soft surface over 6f at Hamilton last September, but was weak in the market when failing in his hat-trick bid at Pontefract (6f, soft) the following month; may need this first start in six months and wouldn't want the ground to dry out too much."

      {

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Last few efforts have been modest, but all three turf wins have come over C&D on good to firm ground, while is is 3lb lower than for the latest last summer; has won fresh and very much of interest, especially if conditions continue to dry out; stable also runs Macedonian."

        "run_style": "",

        "spotlight": "Best of five turf runs last season when fourth in a decent 6f Fairyhouse contest in June; handled this surface when a fair third over C&D in November; second here nine days ago; good form claims but vulnerable to a newcomer of Hinder's likely calibre."

        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "A 150,000euros breeze-up buy; 16-1 on debut at Leopardstown, managed a fair fourth of 14 having been outpaced at a crucial stage; met some trouble in running when fourth behind the useful-looking Yellowstone Lake here in September; runner-up Emmeleia has franked the form here recently; should feature now."

        "spotlight": "Fourth foal; by Footstepsinthesand out of Magic Bear, a 5f/6f winner (including at this venue) for this stable; dam is from the family that produced the trainer's Group 1-winning sprinter Slade Power; likely to find a few of her younger rivals too good."
      },

    "runners": [
      {

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Awarded Lingfield handicap in early 2025 before going 2-2 over this C&D; just four starts since the latest of those wins last March and firmly back on track when edged out at Chelmsford one month ago; 2lb nudge can't be quibbled with and he needs considering."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Supreme King",
        "jockey": "Ryan Kavanagh(5)",
        "trainer": "David Evans",

        "rpr": "92",

        "stall": 1,

        "score": "55.3",
        "model_pct": "14.6%",
        "fair_odds": "6.84",
        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "-5.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "0-8 here but completed a 6f hat-trick when scoring at Kempton (Polytrack; also won on Tapeta) in February; repeatedly denied a run when unlucky fifth next time and latest third (Hunky Dory fifth) was a solid effort a fortnight ago; considered."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Papa Cocktail",
        "jockey": "Callum Rodriguez",

        "ts": "76",
        "rpr": "91",

        "stall": 2,

        "best_dec": "3.50",
        "edge": "-16.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Track regular who doubled his tally over C&D when scoring in January and ran respectably in two subsequent starts in this higher grade; sometimes needs luck in the run but he's respected."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Lazzar",
        "jockey": "Finley Marsh",
        "trainer": "Richard Hughes",
        "ts": "78",
        "rpr": "91",
        "or": "78",
        "form": "-12618",

        "stall": 7,

        "fair_odds": "7.84",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "+4.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Good spell on AW without headgear this winter, winning Lingfield novice and three Polytrack handicaps (all 6f); cheekpieces were back on when below that form at Chelmsford (raced wide) last time and connections are sticking with them; still not discounted."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Hunky Dory",
        "jockey": "Hollie Doyle",
        "trainer": "Jack Morland",
        "ts": "81",
        "rpr": "90",
        "or": "76",
        "form": "221-55",

        "dam_sire": "Smart Strike",
        "stall": 6,

        "score": "53.1",
        "model_pct": "9.2%",
        "fair_odds": "10.81",
        "best_dec": "6.00",
        "edge": "-8.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Took well to first-time cheekpieces when opening his account in December Southwell handicap; spoiled the follow-up attempt by racing too freely and subsequently left Mick Appleby for 30,000gns; had excuses when fair fifth on stable debut at Chelmsford (also 6f; Supreme King third, Lazzar behind) a fortnight ago and might emerge best of that trio this time."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,

        "ts": "74",

        "fair_odds": "13.03",
        "best_dec": "21.00",
        "edge": "+2.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Belied 66-1 odds when second on March's stable debut, taking her form figures in 6f handicaps at this track to 1312; way off that when dropped to 5f here a fortnight later but her C&D record cannot be ignored."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Can have an off day but his maiden win came over C&D just over a year ago and he ran well on occasions subsequently; only made the track once as a juvenile so possible he'll do better this term."
      },

        "rank": 8,

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Last of seven in Lingfield Class 2 (6f, Polytrack) on reappearance and just mid-division when back on turf at Doncaster (7f) 12 days ago; that took his record to to 0-9 since debut win but this represents his easiest task for a while; due a further 2lb drop but still needs a second look."
      }
    ]
  },

        "spotlight": "Solid 6f form at this venue under today's rider, notably a staying-on second in a nursery last November; fourth of 14 the following month after being squeezed for room two furlongs down; steps up in trip after a creditable third here last week on his first 2026 outing; could score with just a little improvement."

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won twice at this venue for Joseph O'Brien early in his career (2019 and 2020); absent throughout 2023 and 2024; did well on his reappearance over an extended 1m at Wolverhampton last month, ran prominently all the way and beat all bar the favourite; strong contender if replicating that form."

  {
    "course": "Wolverhampton (AW)",
    "time": "19:00",
    "race_name": "Free Digital Racecard At raceday-ready.com Handicap",
    "type": "flat",

    "dist": "1m4f",

    "class": "Class 6",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 3,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Divot (GB)",

        "ts": "58",
        "rpr": "69",
        "or": "55",

        "model_pct": "18.2%",
        "fair_odds": "5.49",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Yet to score but has posted some solid efforts since June, including when second over C&D in September; raced freely when disappointing at Southwell the following month but the added hood might help and Oisin Murphy's booking suggests he's ready for this return."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Gemini Man",
        "jockey": "Lewis Edmunds",
        "trainer": "Iain Jardine",
        "ts": "40",
        "rpr": "67",
        "or": "49",
        "form": "225-12",

        "dam_sire": "Gulch",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "51.9",
        "model_pct": "15.9%",
        "fair_odds": "6.28",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Landed a first AW success when getting up late to bag 9.5f classified here in February; backed that up when second in another course classified over this trip one month ago; went close off this sort of mark when last tackling a Flat handicap (turf) in August and he's one of the more likely ones."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Beaune",
        "jockey": "Daniel Muscutt",
        "trainer": "Bernard Llewellyn",
        "ts": "55",
        "rpr": "67",
        "or": "51",
        "form": "36-122",
        "sire": "Blue Point",
        "dam_sire": "Frankel",
        "stall": 12,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "51.6",
        "model_pct": "15.3%",
        "fair_odds": "6.55",
        "best_dec": "7.00",
        "edge": "-1.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "In good nick since returning from a break, registering a win and two seconds at 1m4f (two classifieds, one handicap) since February; mark is creeping up and wide draw not ideal but he holds solid claims once again."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Everest",
        "jockey": "Rhys Clutterbuck",
        "trainer": "Gary & Josh Moore",
        "ts": "40",
        "rpr": "67",
        "or": "52",
        "form": "55-031",
        "sire": "Kayf Tara",
        "dam_sire": "Jeremy",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "48.3",
        "model_pct": "9.8%",
        "fair_odds": "10.20",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "-1.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Went into her last race a 14-race maiden but she'd shown bits and bobs across both codes and got off the mark, staying on strongly to land Lingfield classified (1m4f, Polytrack) a fortnight ago; unexposed in this sphere despite her age and could be a leftfield improver; chance."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Moon Over The Sea",
        "jockey": "Jack Doughty",

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Patchy form since winning at Southwell (1m3f) in January; first-time cheekpieces did no harm when third over that C&D a fortnight ago but goes without them this time; still can't be discounted."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,

        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "-2.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Used to stay this sort of trip; very low-key start for this yard but has gradually found his level and was blinkered when third in 9.5f course selling handicap ten days ago; cheekpieces, previously worn without success, are refitted."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Made successful handicap debut at Lingfield (1m5f, Polytrack) in December and finished runner-up three times since, including over C&D; wheels have come off lately, however, and first-time cheekpieces need to get her firmly back on track."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,

        "fair_odds": "19.44",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Gained sole win on third start for this yard when staying on at Ffos Las (1m2f, good to soft) in June; some respectable efforts since, including when keeping-on sixth on AW debut at Kempton (1m4f) in November; possibilities if ready for this first start since so watch the market."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,

        "best_dec": "29.00",
        "edge": "+1.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won a weak four-runner handicap at Ffos Las (1m6f, good) under David Probert in July but mostly poor form under both codes since; appeared to take a step back in the right direction when second over hurdles last time and Probert is back in the saddle for the first time since that win."

      {

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Maiden who threatened to get off the mark in both starts when wearing cheekpieces in February; bombed out in a newly fitted visor when apprentice-ridden at Southwell last time but needs a second look with the cheekpieces back on."
      },

        "rank": 11,

        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",

        "spotlight": "Landed some tidy bets when taking this in 2024 but subsequently went on a barren spell; finally back on the scoresheet last month but disappointed in a classified (also C&D) one week later; had an excuse that day but others look more solid."

      }
    ]
  },

        "spotlight": "Well held in all four runs but he made some late headway after stumbling on his nursery debut at Kempton (1m, Polytrack; 9-2) last August; returns after a lengthy absence but he has some stamina in his good pedigree and needs watching in market at this new trip."
